title: Mara Kaine — The Drawer
atmospheric_profile: symbolic portrait of the creator through her abandoned objects: open desk drawer containing pearl necklace, key, face-down photos, cassette labeled 'Mara - Summer 1978', pressed flower, moth — all in soft window light with dust
quality_notes: Masterful symbolic representation of the creator. The cassette label, face-down photos, and moth create a complete emotional biography without ever showing a face. Lighting, texture, and melancholy are perfect. Highest quality creator banner.
